extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI Michal won as Team Sky executed tactically perfect TTT rotation, taking yellow by 37 seconds over BMC.
tactical_patterns: Sky placed three riders in prologue top-9, pre-loading TTT strength through individual TT selection rather than climbing specialists.
AG2R handicapped with only six riders after Villermoz abandon, losing 1:29 despite strong intermediate splits showing attrition impact.
BMC and Movistar under 1-minute down suggests GC teams prioritized saving leaders over maximum effort against Sky's depth.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: positive: reclaimed yellow after losing it Stage 2, confirming Sky's TTT dominance translates leadership control
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: Bahrain lost 2+ minutes indicating weak TTT depth threatens GC ambitions on balanced stage races
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: fell to 1:52 deficit suggesting Sky prioritizing Kwiatkowski/Thomas over defending his GC position
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: AG2R's 7th at 1:29 despite strong intermediates reveals team weakness will cost him in future TTT stages
